issue_body_preview:
This PR modifies how `<ComboBox>` calculates its offset.

It uses `el.getBoundingClientRect()` to detect the difference between the selected item and the ComboBox's button and moves the menu by this difference.

This does not fix the other issue when the ComboBox will be displayed out of the scr
test_description_zh: 打开一个包含多个选项的 ComboBox 组件，选择列表中间或靠后的某个选项后关闭下拉菜单，然后再次点击 ComboBox 按钮展开下拉菜单，观察下拉菜单的弹出位置是否与 ComboBox 按钮对齐。
expected_result_zh: ComboBox 下拉菜单弹出时，当前选中的选项应与 ComboBox 按钮在垂直方向上正确对齐，下拉菜单的偏移量应根据选中项与按钮之间的位置差异进行精确计算，不出现明显的错位现象。
